intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% for 10:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 5:00 at 75%. Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 75%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 5:00 at 75%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 75% for 5:00. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/22. 0:30 at 120%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 120% FTP, Standing. 30s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 17% through. This is your workout. Own it. 120% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/22. 120% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 17% complete. Rep 2/22. 120% for 30s. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 18% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 4:30 at 75%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 18% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/22. 0:30 at 123%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 23% complete. Rep 4/22. 123% at 90-110 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20 minutes of work done. 64 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/22. 123% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/22. 123% FTP, 90-110 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 4:30 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 4:30. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 4:30 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 24% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/22. 0:30 at 126%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 126% FTP, Standing. 30s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 6/22. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 16 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 6/22. 126% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 29% into session. 126%, 90-110 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 30% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 30% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 55 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 30% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 8/22. 0:30 at 129%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 129% FTP, Standing. 30s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 35% done. 14 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 8/22. 129% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 8/22. 129% FTP, 90-110 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 4:30 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 35% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 35% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 35% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 10/22. 41% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 41% complete. Rep 10/22. 132% at 90-110 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 132% for 30s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 132% for 30s. Then 49min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 41% into session. 132%, 90-110 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 45 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 135% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 135% for 0:30. Then 0:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 135%, 90-110 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 47% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 0:30 at 135%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 47% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 40 minutes of Z2 work. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 47% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 47% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 138%, 90-110 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:30 at 138%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45 minutes of work done. 39 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 14/22. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 14. 8 to go. 39 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 53% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 75-75% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 53% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 53% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/22. 30s at 141%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 141% × 30s. Then 34min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 58% through. This is your workout. Own it. 141% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 58% done. 6 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 16/22. 141% FTP × 30s. Standing. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 59% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 59% complete. 75% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 59% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 59% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 18/22. 55 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 18. 45min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 18/22. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 4 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 18/22. 55 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 4 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 64% complete. Rep 18/22. 144% for 30s. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 55 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 65% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 55 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% done. 25 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 65% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 70% done. 2 intervals left. 24 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 20 of 22. Target: 147% FTP, 90-110 rpm. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% done. 2 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 20/22. 60 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 2 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 20/22. 147% FTP × 30s. Standing. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 71% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 71% complete. 75% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 71% complete. 20 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 10:00 at 65%. Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 65% for 10:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 65%, Seated. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 10:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 10:00 at 65-65%. Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 75 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 65min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
